scripts.test:module:portal: node --test tests/portal-auth.test.js tests/portal-ui-smoke.test.js && npx playwright test tests/e2e/portal-login-auth.e2e.spec.js --project=chromium
scripts.test:module:booking: node --test tests/booking-availability.test.js tests/booking-ui-smoke.test.js && npx playwright test tests/e2e/booking-contact.e2e.spec.js --project=chromium
